params_frozen.v5_design_provenance: Path β auto-pivot from v10 (analyst_alt_data_v10_2026_05_01) Phase A gate 2 survivorship FAIL. v10 pre-registered the pivot trigger objectively (delisted/active event-rate ratio < 0.5 with z > 2 under bootstrap on yfinance upgrades_downgrades) so swap is not post-hoc. v5 reopens the alt_data_screener_search_2026_04_30 class with selection-rule variable change: drop short leg, keep long top-decile only.
params_frozen.class_rationale: Continuation of CLOSED class alt_data_screener_search_2026_04_30 (4/4 prior FAIL). v4 FAIL'd on short leg (αt=−2.57 with short leg returning +108.5%/y in squeeze regime); long leg gained +20.6%/y across all sub-periods. v5 isolates SELECTION-ASYMMETRY variable: same features, same Lasso, same target, drop short leg.
params_frozen.class_bonferroni: v1 abandoned + v2 FAIL + v3 FAIL + v4 FAIL + v5 active = n=5 in class -> in-class threshold |t|>=2.58. PROGRAM-LEVEL across all classes: same 9 prior + this v5 = n=10 -> |t|>=2.81. v5 USES PROGRAM-LEVEL 2.81 AS PRIMARY PASS GATE (CONSERVATIVE choice given HARKing flag).
params_frozen.harking_caveat_explicit: Path β was post-hoc designed against observed v4 long-leg performance (+20.6%/y across 2024-04-30 -> 2026-04-30 sub-periods). Per Kerr 1998 + Simmons et al. 2011 this is classical hypothesis-mining. We pre-registered the auto-pivot trigger from v10 (objective survivorship gate) BEFORE seeing v10's verdict, so the SWITCH from γ to β is not post-hoc; but the design of β itself was motivated by observed v4 long-leg data. Capital deploy OFF-TABLE regardless of any PASS verdict; fresh-OOS replication on data not yet observed is mandatory before any escalation.
params_frozen.harking_mitigation: Conservative threshold: use program-level |t|>=2.81 (n=10) NOT in-class 2.58 (n=5). This 'doubles down' on multiplicity penalty as compensation for explicit HARKing. Stretch threshold |t|>=3.2 (Romano-Wolf m~50) reported alongside.
params_frozen.architecture: single_global_lasso (target_transform='rank') WITH 10-feature joiner (UNCHANGED from v3, v4)
params_frozen.architecture_rationale: All architecture variables identical to v4. Only selection rule changes.

stage2_conditional_alpha.regularization: L1 with alpha selected via 3-fold expanding-window nested CV on full train pool with 60-day embargo (UNCHANGED)
stage2_conditional_alpha.fit_strategy: single global model fitted on entire train pool with target_transform='rank' (UNCHANGED)
stage2_conditional_alpha.cv_objective: argmin mean fold MSE on rank-transformed target (UNCHANGED)

params_frozen.feature_construction_unchanged: All 10 features identical to v3, v4 per docs/research/preregistration/params_alt_data_screener_v3_2026_05_01.json. No analyst features (Path γ ABORTED on yfinance survivorship hard-block).

target_definition.post_hoc_attribution: Carhart-4F regression of realised 20d-forward LONG-ONLY portfolio excess returns over SPY benchmark on 20d-aggregated Mkt-RF/SMB/HML/MOM with subtract_rf=False.

portfolio_construction.ranking: predicted score per (ticker, asof) from rank-trained Lasso on 10 features (UNCHANGED from v4 model)
portfolio_construction.long_eligibility: post-ADV cross-section (>= $5M ADV at asof, UNCHANGED from v4)
portfolio_construction.overlap_design: Stride=5 with holding=20: 75% overlap, MA(3) autocorrelation, HAC maxlags=5 (UNCHANGED)
portfolio_construction.benchmark: SPY (excess long-only return over SPY enters Carhart regression as primary metric)

cost_model.applied_to: 30 bps round-trip per rebalance (long leg only, NO short leg, NO doubling)
cost_model.rationale: Single-leg rebalance pays half the v4 cost. v4 was 60bps RT (2 legs); v5 is 30bps RT (1 leg).

statistical_inference.carhart_regression: Carhart-4F regression of (long-only portfolio return − SPY return) on Mkt-RF/SMB/HML/MOM with subtract_rf=False. Mkt-RF beta tracked but |β| <= 0.5 only loosely informative (long-only is naturally market-exposed, expect β ≈ 0.7-1.0).

anti_overfit_constraints.no_post_hoc_feature_addition: any new feature requires a new pre-registration
anti_overfit_constraints.no_post_hoc_feature_removal: v5 must run with locked 10-feature whitelist
anti_overfit_constraints.no_short_leg_addition: v5 is long-only; adding short leg post-hoc would re-introduce HARKing

params_frozen.differences_from_v4: ONE settled-as-different variable: selection rule (decile L/S -> long top-decile only). All other variables (features, model class, target, periods, costs scale, attribution) identical to v4 modulo cost reduction (60bps -> 30bps). Threshold uses program-level n=10 (|t|>=2.81) not in-class n=5 (|t|>=2.58) per HARKing mitigation.
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Original Path β spec adversarially reviewed in v10 design memo (zen + perplexity, 2026-05-01 PM). zen ratings: ★★★ on yfinance survivorship for Path γ (which triggered this v5 pivot), ★★ on Path β HARKing flag (acknowledged). perplexity ratings: ★★★ on burnt-holdout multiplicity (mitigated via program-level threshold + diagnostic-only framing), ★★★ on long-only being HARKing-confounded (acknowledged + mitigated via 2.81 not 2.58 threshold).

periods.rationale: Identical to v3, v4, v9, v10. Burnt holdout caveat: 10 prior tests observed this window; v5 mitigates via program-level threshold + stretch + diagnostic-only framing.

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart-4F alpha t-stat (HAC, maxlags=5) on holdout (long_only_return - SPY_return) series
success_criteria.bonferroni_threshold_in_class: n=5 in class -> in-class |t|>=2.58. v5 OVERRIDES with program-level 2.81 per HARKing mitigation.
success_criteria.bonferroni_threshold_program_level: n=10 cumulative across all classes on this holdout -> |t|>=2.81. v5 USES PROGRAM-LEVEL 2.81 AS PRIMARY PASS GATE.
success_criteria.bonferroni_threshold_stretch_romano_wolf: Romano-Wolf approximation under m~50 effective hypotheses -> |t|>=3.2. Reported as STRETCH gate.
success_criteria.pass_rule_primary: Holdout long-only excess-vs-SPY Carhart-4F alpha t-stat >= 2.81 AND Lo-adjusted Sharpe (net) of (long_only - SPY) >= 0.5 AND alpha annualized >= 3% AND MaxDD on (long_only - SPY) >= -25% AND in-CV mean rank-IR >= 0.5 AND holdout mean per-asof rank-IC > 0
success_criteria.pass_rule_stretch: primary PASS conditions AND alpha t-stat >= 3.2

verdict_classification.robust_diagnostic_positive: primary PASS + stretch PASS -> 'directional positive on long-only, robust to conservative multiplicity; replication required on fresh holdout 2026-11+ before any escalation'
verdict_classification.directional_positive: primary PASS + stretch FAIL -> 'directional positive consistent with primary gate but not robust to conservative multiplicity; informational only'
verdict_classification.fail: any primary gate FAIL -> standard FAIL ledger entry

success_criteria.in_class_pass_program_fail: 2.58 <= alpha_t-stat < 2.81 -> reported as 'in-class PASS, program-FAIL', treated as FAIL for actionability
success_criteria.mid_rule: alpha t-stat >= 1.5 AND Sharpe (net) >= 0.3 AND in-CV rank-IR >= 0.3 AND holdout mean per-asof rank-IC > 0 -> MID; refine + re-pre-register
success_criteria.fail_rule: anything that doesn't clear MID -> FAIL, log to ledger
success_criteria.diagnostic_only_clause: BURNT-HOLDOUT MITIGATION: v5 is DIAGNOSTIC ONLY. Capital deploy is OFF-TABLE regardless of holdout verdict. PASS at stretch 3.2 triggers v6 re-pre-registration on truly fresh data.
success_criteria.phase_robustness_followup: If holdout PASS at primary 2.81, run multi-phase audit (5 phase offsets) on 2018-2026 with same architecture; PASS only if every phase alpha t-stat >= 1.5 AND mean alpha t-stat >= 2.81. If holdout FAIL outright, skip Phase C.
success_criteria.regime_stratification_postdoc: DESCRIPTIVE: report long-decile alpha vs SPY for 2024-04-30 -> 2024-12-31 / 2025-01-01 -> 2025-12-31 / 2026-01-01 -> 2026-04-30 sub-periods. Compare against v4's documented +20.6%/y long leg performance to test reproducibility.
